findings.title: Remote code execution vulnerability in SSL/TLS library
findings.description: A critical vulnerability exists in the cryptographic library that could allow remote code execution via malformed certificate chains. CVSS Score: 9.8

findings.title: Memory corruption in JSON deserialization
findings.description: A heap buffer overflow vulnerability in the JSON parsing library allows attackers to execute arbitrary code when processing untrusted input. This affects applications that deserialize user-controlled JSON data.

findings.title: Embedded credentials detected in container layer
findings.description: Static analysis detected potential credentials embedded in the container image. Secrets in container images can be extracted by anyone with access to the image.

findings.title: Cloud provider authentication material exposed
findings.description: Authentication credentials for cloud services were detected. These could be used to gain unauthorized access to cloud resources.

findings.title: Denial of service via resource exhaustion
findings.description: A vulnerability in input processing allows attackers to cause excessive memory consumption leading to denial of service.

findings.title: Authentication bypass in identity library
findings.description: The Azure authentication library contains a vulnerability that could allow token validation bypass under certain conditions. Affects versions prior to 1.10.0.

findings.title: Privileged container execution
findings.description: The container is configured to run with elevated privileges. This increases the attack surface and potential impact of container escapes.

findings.title: Large attack surface
findings.description: The container image contains unnecessary components that increase the attack surface.

findings.title: Cache service credentials exposed
findings.description: Credentials for caching infrastructure detected in image.

findings.title: External API authentication key
findings.description: API key for third-party service found in container.

findings.title: Insecure file permissions on configuration
findings.description: Configuration files have overly permissive access rights.

findings.title: Deprecated serialization library in use
findings.description: The application uses a JSON library with deprecated APIs. While not a security vulnerability, migration is recommended.

findings.title: Buffer overflow in compression library
findings.description: Low severity buffer overflow in decompression routine.

findings.title: C library vulnerabilities
findings.description: Multiple low-severity issues in standard C library.

notes: LOW severity findings do not block deployment per current policy
MEDIUM findings are flagged for review but do not block
Some deprecated library warnings are informational only
